title: Kro
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Kro}}
[[File:Kro.jpg|thumb]]
'''Kro''' were arboreal reptiles native to [[Zelos II]]. They lacked forelimbs but maintained balance with a prehensile tail. They hung on branches by their tails and dropped on prey passing below, securing victims with their tails.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1992-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two]]''
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
*<!-- 1996-02-XX -->{{JournalCite|9|ISB Intercepts}}
